_comment: Bounds for autonomous self-modification of trading parameters. Each field documents how the autonomy layer may move it. Loosening beyond these caps is HIGH_RISK and is rejected by patch_validator.

size_multiplier.comment: Daily learning may step size up by at most 20% per run, decrease by up to half. Sample-size enforcement lives in learning-loop/validation.py.

strategy_enabled.comment: Strategies can autonomously pause on risk/failure. Resume requires cooldown + N consecutive OK health checks + risk condition resolved.

options.comment: OPTIONS_ENABLED env still gates everything. Autonomy can disable freely; enabling requires the operator's env to be set AND the safety gates to pass.

exposure_caps.comment: Autonomy may make the system safer (tighter caps). Loosening exposure caps beyond the active profile's limits is HIGH_RISK and never auto-merged.

llm_role.comment: LLM is untrusted input. Validators (state_schema + validation + patch_validator) decide what survives.

code_loop.comment: Code self-improvement is bounded by the validator + CI + post-merge health check. Daily cap stops a runaway loop.
